overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a dystopian urban underpass and plaza. The scene features prominent cyan neon lighting, holographic advertisements, a giant illuminated statue, and encounters with NPCs near food vendors in a rain-soaked, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit concrete underpass

entered.detail: large red neon-style mural of a figure with a hat and cane on the concrete wall
horizontal cyan fluorescent tubes mounted on the ceiling providing primary illumination
massive rectangular concrete pillars supporting the highway overpass above
scattered trash, rubble, and discarded items along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a covered urban underpass illuminated by prominent cyan neon tubes. A large red graffiti mural decorates the left wall while concrete support pillars line the path. The environment is sheltered from rain and completely devoid of other people.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional zone between underpass and open plaza

events.description: exiting the enclosed underpass into a partially covered transition area
passing by two stationary figures standing near a concrete barrier on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through the transitional space, approaching the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: two figures standing motionless near a concrete barrier on the left side

entered.detail: giant holographic advertisement projection of a man's face visible in the distance
derelict cars and trucks abandoned along the path edges

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered underpass into a transitional zone where the sky becomes partially visible. A massive holographic face billboard appears in the distance. Two stationary NPCs stand by a barrier on the left as the concrete pillars recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open wasteland plaza under elevated highways

events.description: approaching a burning vehicle casting bright orange illumination across the path
ground surface transitions from concrete to muddy dirt with sparse grass

agents.ego_description: traversing the muddy open area toward the giant illuminated statue

notable_agents.action: abandoned car engulfed in flames providing warm orange light

entered.detail: massive sculptural monument of a female figure with red neon decorative lights
elevated concrete highway structure with support columns

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide exposed area under the night sky. A burning car on the right casts flickering orange light across the muddy ground. In the distance, a colossal statue with red neon lights dominates the skyline while a holographic billboard shifts to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza surrounding the giant statue

events.description: circling around the base of the giant statue while ascending steps

agents.ego_description: circling around the base of the massive statue, observing its scale and details

entered.detail: tiered concrete platforms and stairs leading up to the statue base

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the base of the massive illuminated statue, ascending concrete steps. The statue's red decorative lights become prominent as the burning car recedes into the background. The plaza is empty and surrounded by elevated highway structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: market plaza with food vendors and NPCs

events.description: entering a populated plaza area with food stalls and standing NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward a group of NPCs gathered near food vendors

notable_agents.action: person with purple hair and minimal clothing standing near concrete steps
vendor wearing an animal mask and purple skirt standing by a food trailer

entered.detail: small food vendor trailer with bright overhead fluorescent lighting
low concrete walls and metal barriers around the plaza perimeter
various colored neon signs and lights on surrounding building facades

segments.scene_description: Moving past the statue, the scene transitions to a populated plaza with paved tiles. A food trailer with bright lighting appears on the right, staffed by a masked vendor. An NPC with purple hair stands near the center. The area is surrounded by concrete barriers and distant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor stall area under awning

events.description: slowing down and stopping near the food vendor trailer

agents.ego_description: approaching and stopping in front of the masked vendor at the food trailer

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a mask and purple skirt leaning against the trailer wall

entered.detail: metal awning extending over the vendor area providing shelter
advertising poster and menu board on the side of the trailer

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the food trailer closely, moving under the sheltered awning area. The masked vendor stands prominently on the right next to poster boards. The surroundings become more enclosed as the plaza opens recede, and the camera slows to a stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, neon-lit underpass into a sprawling, rain-soaked urban plaza. It begins within a sheltered concrete corridor illuminated by cyan neon tubes and red graffiti, moving forward until the ceiling opens to a night sky and a massive holographic face appears in the distance. As the camera emerges into the open air, the scene shifts from cool tones to the flickering orange glow of a burning car, eventually leading toward a colossal red-lit statue that dominates the skyline. The perspective then ascends concrete steps to circle the base of the monument before gliding into a populated plaza featuring a bright food trailer and a masked vendor. Finally, the camera moves under the trailer's sheltered awning, closing in on the vendor as the wide expanse of the city recedes into the background.
